exercises.name: Hand Walk-Out
exercises.instructions: Get into a plank position and walk your hands in and out

exercises.name: Side Plank
exercises.instructions: Take a few breaths, repeat on other side

exercises.name: Half-Kneeling Pallof Press Against Wall
exercises.instructions: Take a few breaths, repeat on other side

exercises.name: Mountain Climbers
exercises.instructions: Do a dozen or so to get warmed up

exercises.name: Bodyweight Glute Bridge
exercises.instructions: Do a dozen or so to get warmed up

exercises.name: Side Lying Leg Lift
exercises.instructions: Do a few to get warmed up

warmups.name: THE BIG FIVE (OPTIONAL)   USE 20 POUND DUMBBELL, KETTLEBELL, OR EMPTY BARBELL

exercises.name: 1-Arm Farmer Carry
exercises.instructions: Walk for a bit, repeat on other side

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.instructions: Do a few to get warmed up

exercises.name: Bent-Over Row
exercises.instructions: Do a few to get warmed up, repeat on other side

exercises.name: Push-Ups
exercises.instructions: Do a few to get warmed up

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.instructions: Do a few to get warmed up. Do some extra dumbbell sumo deadlifts if you want.
